name: Hanan Mor Group - Holdings Ltd
summary: Hanan Mor Group - Holdings Ltd operates as a real estate development company in Israel and internationally. It initiates, constructs, and develops residential real estate properties; and commercial real estate properties, such as hotels, shopping centers, malls, and offices. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Ness Ziona, Israel. Hanan Mor Group - Holdings Ltd is a subsidiary of Hanan Mor Group Holdings 2006 Ltd.
